component.name: PiLauncher
component.summary: 专为手柄设计的 Minecraft 启动器

description.p: PiLauncher 是一款为游戏手柄和掌机量身定制的 Minecraft 启动器。它拥有为主机式体验优化的全屏用户界面，让你可以轻松地使用手柄管理、配置和运行你的 Minecraft 游戏实例。

PiLauncher is a Minecraft launcher tailored for gamepads and handheld consoles. It features a full-screen, console-like user interface optimized for controller inputs, allowing you to easily manage and launch your Minecraft instances.

ul.li: 完全支持手柄操作，提供沉浸式大屏体验。
Full gamepad support for an immersive large-screen experience.
自动识别和配置手柄相关模组。
Automatic detection and configuration of gamepad-related mods.
极简且现代化的实例和模组管理。
Minimalist and modern instance and mod management.

description.p: 局域网同步功能上线与实例部署稳定性优化

ul.li: [新功能] 实现局域网设备自动发现、配对与信任管理服务，支持跨设备实例与存档投送。
[新功能] 新增后台游戏时长统计服务，支持多设备间游玩数据实时同步。
[新功能] 重构资源中心，实现 Mod 库深度搜索、依赖自动解析与一键安装功能。
[新功能] 全新「衣柜」皮肤预览模态框，支持 3D 渲染与更细致的皮肤自定义。
[优化] 引入“原子化部署”流程，彻底解决部署异常时产生幽灵文件夹及数据库残留的问题。
[优化] 深度重构身份验证架构，采用六层解耦设计，显著提升微软及 Xbox 登录稳定性。
[优化] 优化全局侧边栏布局与下载管理器 UI，大幅提升手柄操作下的信息密度与易用性。

description.p: LAN Sync Support and Deployment Stability Improvements

ul.li: [New] Implemented LAN device discovery, pairing, and trust management for seamless cross-device instance and save transfers.
[New] Added background playtime tracking with real-time cross-device data synchronization.
[New] Refactored Resource Center with integrated project search, dependency resolution, and one-click mod installation.
[New] Introduced a new Wardrobe preview modal featuring 3D skin rendering and detailed customization.
[Optimization] Implemented Atomic Deployment workflow to ensure zero-residue cleanup on installation failures.
[Optimization] Architecturally refactored authentication logic using a decoupled six-layer design for enhanced stability.
[Optimization] Refined sidebar layout and download manager UI for improved information density and controller usability.
